creator: joemann@beefree.free.de
text:
(In reply to Robert Cina from comment #12)

A few days after your confirmation (thanx!) upstream released 110.98,
with more bug fixes and docs. So I prepared a patch for 110.98 which I
submitted as PR 248431 [1]. As the new patch contains the workaround
for building with Clang 10, this PR here (247421) should be closed when
the new patch will be accepted.

[1] <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=248431>
